meaning: n.资本结构之改变,资本额的调整
examples: A substantial thrust of the effort of management is to explore a recapitalization of the company.
Recapitalization Key Part of Proposed Vulnerability Fund
The EFSF's mandate and size need to be expanded to include bank recapitalization.
It would have denied deductions for corporate debt incurred in a takeover or recapitalization.
Lee Partners acquired a 40% stake in Sterling and led a USD 730m recapitalization process.
